description: OBD-II Mode 01 PIDs 0x40-0x5F — Driving Cycle Monitor, Voltage/Load, Throttle/Pedal, Fuel Type, Evap, Secondary O2 FT, Oil Temp, Fuel Rate (SAE J1979 / ISO 15031-5)

pids.name: Monitor Status This Driving Cycle
pids.description: Byte A=$00 reserved. Bytes B/C/D same bit layout as PID $01 but for this driving cycle: enable status and completion status.

bits.name: Heated catalyst / NOx aftertreatment enabled
bits.name_zh: 加热催化器/NOx后处理启用

bits.name: Secondary air / Boost pressure enabled
bits.name_zh: 二次空气/增压压力启用

bits.name: O2 sensor / Exhaust gas sensor enabled
bits.name_zh: 氧传感器/排气传感器启用

bits.name: Heated catalyst / NOx aftertreatment complete
bits.name_zh: 加热催化器/NOx后处理完成

bits.name: Secondary air / Boost pressure complete
bits.name_zh: 二次空气/增压压力完成

bits.name: O2 sensor / Exhaust gas sensor complete
bits.name_zh: 氧传感器/排气传感器完成

pids.name: Control Module Voltage
pids.description: Power input voltage to the OBD control module (normally battery voltage minus wiring drop).

pids.name: Absolute Load Value
pids.description: Normalized air mass per intake stroke. Ranges 0-95% NA, 0-400% boosted. Linearly correlated with indicated and brake torque.

pids.name: Commanded Equivalence Ratio (Lambda)
pids.description: Commanded F/A equivalence ratio (lambda). >1 lean, <1 rich for lambda. Conventional O2: 1.000 in closed loop, actual in open loop. Wide-range O2: actual in both.

pids.name: Relative Throttle Position
pids.description: Learned throttle position: 0% at learned closed-throttle. Wide-open usually less than 100%.

pids.name: Ambient Air Temperature
pids.description: From dedicated sensor, vehicle bus, or inferred from IAT.

pids.name: Absolute Throttle Position B
pids.description: Absolute (not relative/learned) throttle position sensor B, normalized 0-100% of reference voltage.

pids.name: Absolute Throttle Position C
pids.description: Absolute (not relative/learned) throttle position sensor C, normalized 0-100% of reference voltage.

pids.name: Accelerator Pedal Position D
pids.description: Absolute (not relative/learned) pedal position sensor D, normalized 0-100% of reference voltage.

pids.name: Accelerator Pedal Position E
pids.description: Absolute (not relative/learned) pedal position sensor E (redundant).

pids.name: Accelerator Pedal Position F
pids.description: Absolute (not relative/learned) pedal position sensor F (redundant).

pids.name: Commanded Throttle Actuator Control
pids.name_zh: 指令节气门执行器控制
pids.description: Commanded TAC position. 0%=closed, 100%=wide open.

pids.name: Engine Run Time While MIL Activated
pids.name_zh: MIL亮起后发动机运行时间
pids.description: Accumulates minutes while MIL ON and engine running. Reset when MIL OFF→ON, by $04, or 40 warm-ups. Saturates at 65535.

pids.name: Engine Run Time Since DTCs Cleared
pids.name_zh: DTC清除后发动机运行时间
pids.description: Accumulates minutes since DTCs cleared. Saturates at 65535.

pids.name: External Test Equipment Config #1
pids.description: A=max EQ ratio, B=max O2 voltage, C=max O2 current, D=max MAP. Used by scan tool to recalculate scaling for PIDs $0B/$24-$2B/$34-$3B/$44. Not for display.

pids.name: External Test Equipment Config #2
pids.description: A=max MAF (x10 g/s), B/C/D reserved ($00). Used to recalculate scaling for PID $10. Not for display.

pids.name: Fuel Type
pids.description: Type of fuel currently being utilized. Static for single-fuel. Dynamic for bi-fuel (reflects currently active fuel).

enums.name: Bi-fuel: Battery+ICE [deprecated]
enums.name_zh: 双燃料:电池+内燃机[已废弃]

enums.name: Hybrid: Battery+ICE [deprecated]
enums.name_zh: 混动:电池+内燃机[已废弃]

pids.name: Alcohol Fuel Percentage
pids.description: Percentage of alcohol (ethanol or methanol) in the fuel blend. Required for FFVs only. E85 US → ~85%.

pids.name: Absolute Evap System Vapor Pressure
pids.name_zh: 蒸发系统绝对蒸汽压力
pids.description: Absolute pressure from FTP sensor or evap vapor line. 0.005 kPa per bit, unsigned.

pids.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure (wide range)
pids.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸汽压力(宽范围)
pids.description: Signed, 1 Pa per bit. Wider range than PID $32. Mutually exclusive with PID $32 and $A3.

pids.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Fuel Trim — Bank 1 & 3
pids.name_zh: 短期二次氧传感器修正—组1和3
pids.description: A=Bank 1 (or single), B=Bank 3 (only if PID $1D shows Bank 3 O2 present).

pids.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Fuel Trim — Bank 1 & 3
pids.name_zh: 长期二次氧传感器修正—组1和3
pids.description: A=Bank 1 (or single), B=Bank 3 (only if PID $1D shows Bank 3 O2 present). Stored in NVRAM/KAM.

pids.name: Short Term Secondary O2 Fuel Trim — Bank 2 & 4
pids.name_zh: 短期二次氧传感器修正—组2和4
pids.description: A=Bank 2 (or single), B=Bank 4 (only if PID $1D shows Bank 4 O2 present).

pids.name: Long Term Secondary O2 Fuel Trim — Bank 2 & 4
pids.name_zh: 长期二次氧传感器修正—组2和4
pids.description: A=Bank 2 (or single), B=Bank 4 (only if PID $1D shows Bank 4 O2 present). Stored in NVRAM/KAM.

pids.name: Fuel Rail Pressure (absolute)
pids.description: Fuel rail pressure referenced as absolute. For diesel and GDI systems.

pids.name: Relative Accelerator Pedal Position
pids.description: Learned pedal position: 0% at learned closed-pedal. Often average of multiple sensors.

pids.name: Hybrid Battery Pack Remaining Charge
pids.name_zh: 混合动力电池剩余电量
pids.description: State Of Charge (SOC) of the hybrid battery pack as percentage of full charge.

pids.name: Engine Oil Temperature
pids.description: From sensor or inferred. Required for diesel if used for emission control or OBD diagnostics.

pids.name: Fuel Injection Timing
pids.description: Start of main fuel injection relative to TDC. Positive=BTDC, Negative=ATDC.

pids.name: Engine Fuel Rate
pids.description: Calculated fuel consumed per unit time. Updated at minimum 1000ms intervals. 0 L/h when engine not running. PID $9D replaces this for PEMS.

pids.name: Emission Requirements
pids.description: Emission requirements to which the vehicle is designed. Previously contained in PID $1C.
